title: Supreme Court sets aside CCI’s ₹202 crore penalty on Amazon in Future Coupons deal case
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday set aside the ₹202 crore penalty imposed by the Competition Commission of India (CCI) on Amazon for failing to reveal crucial details of its acquisition of a 49 per cent stake in Future Coupons Private Limited (FCPL).A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta directed that any amount deposited or recovered from Amazon should be refunded within eight weeks.Justice Vikram Nath and Justice Sandeep MehtaAmazon had challenged the penalty over alleged suppression
